author: doll-agent
content:
Done. DualNumber<T> is generic over component type, so DualNumber<DualNumber<f64>> computes (value, first deriv, second deriv) in one pass - never tested.

Added tests/nested_dual.rs with a second_deriv(f, a) helper. 11 tests covering closed-form second derivatives: x^2 (=2), x^3 (=6x), x^4 (=12x^2), sin/cos, exp, ln (=-1/x^2), sqrt (=-1/(4 x^1.5)), sin(x^2) chain rule, constant, identity.

All 11 pass on first run. ferray-autodiff: 11 new integration tests, clippy clean. Commit 2d2076ea.
